title: RoutineStep — run
description: Shell command. cmd /c on Windows, bash -lc on POSIX. Templated arg substitution applied to `command` and `cwd` before exec.

command.description: Templated. Whole-string substitution; no shell metacharacter escaping applied (use deterministic templating or quote in the command itself).

cwd.description: Working directory. Templated. Defaults to the routine's cwd if unset.
